atoms.title: Auxiliary-Loss-Free Load Balancing Strategy for Mixture-of-Experts
atoms.text: Loss-Free Balancing will first apply an expert-wise bias to the routing scores of each expert, then dynamically update the bias of each expert according to its recent load to consistently maintain a balanced distribution of expert load.

atoms.title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
atoms.text: The core innovation in Mamba is that SSM parameters are functions of the input, which allows the model to selectively propagate or forget information along the sequence length dimension depending on the current token.

atoms.title: Frictional healing and induced earthquakes on conventionally stable faults
atoms.text: The observed strength increase originates from the growth of grain contacts (asperities) and compaction via pressure solution as well as the development of cohesion, and the slip after fault reactivation increases with the time of inactivity, obtaining larger stress drops after a longer healing time.
